data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a technical issue protocol, specifically regarding lost connections during the exam. While the linked use case mentions that the candidate rejoins after a connection loss and that the proctor verifies identity again, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that confirm the implementation of this protocol as a formal requirement. This indicates a gap in the evidence, as the expected result of capturing a precise, reproducible gap was not achieved.
gaps: No concrete evidence or API reads confirming the implementation of the technical issue protocol for lost connections.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for technical issue protocol
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the technical issue protocol for lost connections.
